steps.title: Read two intercepts
steps.content: The graph passes through $(0,40)$ and $(60,0)$. A correct equation must be true for both points.

steps.title: Test the matching equation
steps.content:
Choice B is $8x+12y=480$. Check the intercepts:
$$(0,40):\quad 8(0)+12(40)=480$$
$$(60,0):\quad 8(60)+12(0)=480$$
Both points work, so choice B matches the graph.

steps.title: Eliminate the slope mismatches
steps.content: Choices A and C have positive slope, but the graph slopes downward. Choice D has the wrong intercepts. Therefore B is correct.
